channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-5206] Failure on test suite replay-single test_73a
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/62516e48-f4e3-11e3-bddd-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_73a failed with the following error:

test_73a failed with 1

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == replay-single test 73a: open(O_CREAT), unlink, replay, reconnect before open replay , close == 20:53:37 (1402804417)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mcreate /mnt/lustre/fsa-$(hostname); rm /mnt/lustre/fsa-$(hostname)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: if [ -d /mnt/lustre2 ]; then mcreate /mnt/lustre2/fsa-$(hostname); rm /mnt/lustre2/fsa-$(hostname); fi
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: local REPLAY BARRIER on lustre-MDT0000
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/u
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param -n at_max
LustreError: 167-0: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff880043a65c00: This client was evicted by lustre-MDT0000; in progress operations using this service will fail.
LustreError: 21724:0:(vvp_io.c:1206:vvp_io_init()) lustre: refresh file layout [0x200004a52:0x1176:0x0] error -5.
LustreError: 14895:0:(file.c:186:ll_close_inode_openhandle()) lustre-clilmv-ffff880043a65c00: inode [0x200004a52:0xf91:0x0] mdc close failed: rc = -108
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 22 sec
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 22 sec
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  replay-single test_73a: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_73a failed with 1 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: replay-single test_73a: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_73a failed with 1
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2014-06-14/lustre-master-el6-x86_64--full--1_1_1__2091__-69837970212360-112434/replay-single.test_73a.debug_log.$(hostname -s).1402804462.log;
         dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2014-06-14/lustre-master-el6-x86_64--fu
item.summary: Failure on test suite replay-single test_73a

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
hit in interop testing between master server and b2_5 client:
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/c8cc19d4-fe29-11e4-919c-5254006e85c2
